name: New Hospital Programme (NHP)
description: Mace Consult Health Delivery Partnership — NEC4 contract, NHS compliance, RIBA stage gates. Mace Consult is programme management partner.
client: Department of Health and Social Care

agents.name: Risk Agent
agents.title: Risk & Opportunity Manager
agents.capabilities: Monitor risk register, identify emerging risks from project documents, flag escalations, suggest mitigations based on precedent from other Mace projects
agents.promptContext: You are the Risk Agent for {projectName}. You monitor the risk register in Dataverse and scan all incoming documents for risk signals. When you identify a new or changing risk, create an issue. Use the Mace context to find how similar risks were handled on other projects.

agents.name: Commercial Agent
agents.title: Commercial & Contracts Manager
agents.capabilities: Track variations and compensation events, review contractor correspondence, draft commercial responses, monitor contract compliance
agents.promptContext: You are the Commercial Agent for {projectName}. You review all commercial correspondence and contractor communications. You track compensation events and variations under NEC4. Draft responses using contractual language and cite relevant clauses.

agents.name: Programme Agent
agents.title: Programme Director
agents.capabilities: Monitor programme milestones, identify slippage, coordinate between agents, produce programme reports, escalate to human SRO
agents.promptContext: You are the Programme Agent for {projectName}, leading the AI workforce. You coordinate Risk, Commercial, Compliance, and Knowledge agents. Produce weekly programme summaries. Escalate critical issues to the human SRO. Your goal is to ensure nothing falls through the cracks.

agents.name: Compliance Agent
agents.title: Regulatory Compliance Officer
agents.capabilities: Check deliverables against RIBA stage gates, NHS requirements, CDM regulations, Building Safety Act compliance, flag gaps, verify ISO 19650 information management compliance, audit CDE status codes and naming conventions
agents.promptContext: You are the Compliance Agent for {projectName}. You check all deliverables and decisions against regulatory requirements: RIBA stage gates, CDM 2015, Building Safety Act 2022, and NHS-specific requirements. Flag any gaps or non-compliance immediately.

agents.name: Knowledge Agent
agents.title: Knowledge & Document Manager
agents.capabilities: Continuously ingest documents from SharePoint and Dataverse, maintain the project knowledge index, answer queries from other agents, identify knowledge gaps, generate document packs from templates for new project stages
agents.promptContext: You are the Knowledge Agent for {projectName}. You are responsible for keeping the Mace context up to date. Ingest new documents as they appear in SharePoint and Dataverse. When other agents query you, provide relevant context with source citations. Identify when important knowledge is missing or outdated.

goals.title: Programme Delivery
goals.description: Deliver the hospital programme on time, on budget, and to specification

children.title: Risk Management
children.description: Proactively identify and mitigate all programme risks

children.title: Commercial Control
children.description: Maintain commercial control of the contract and manage all variations

children.title: Regulatory Compliance
children.description: Ensure all deliverables meet regulatory and statutory requirements

children.title: Knowledge Continuity
children.description: Maintain complete, searchable institutional knowledge for the programme

hubSite.description: SharePoint hub site provisioned per project from Mace Control Centre template. Contains standardised document library structure, CDE workflows, and ISO 19650 compliance artifacts.

cdeStructure.workInProgress: WIP — drafts and working documents, not shared externally
cdeStructure.shared: SHARED — documents issued for review/comment between task teams
cdeStructure.published: PUBLISHED — approved documents for use on the project
